proposed_tags.label: Theme
proposed_tags.reason: Delego provides a theme component containing design tokens mapped onto shadcn variables, which is not covered by existing tags.

proposed_tags.label: Status pill
proposed_tags.reason: The status‑badge component combines a pill‑shaped badge with status colours (allow/deny/approval), so a new tag distinguishes these status chips from generic badges.

proposed_tags.label: Decision pill
proposed_tags.reason: Delego’s decision-pill component renders an allow/approve/deny decision with icon and colour; no existing tag captures this unique element.

proposed_tags.label: Pill/Chip
proposed_tags.reason: While generic badges exist, pill‑shaped chips are distinct and appear in multiple registries (e.g., decision-pill, status-badge).

proposed_tags.label: Receipt / Audit record
proposed_tags.reason: Delego’s signed-receipt component produces a hash‑chained ledger record; this unique data‑display item merits its own tag.

proposed_tags.label: Audit visual
proposed_tags.reason: Signed receipt functions as an audit trail visual; a dedicated tag helps filter audit‑oriented components.

proposed_tags.label: OTP input
proposed_tags.reason: Delta’s input‑otp component provides a multi‑field one‑time‑password input; this pattern deserves a separate tag for security and auth flows.

proposed_tags.label: Code block
proposed_tags.reason: Delta offers a syntax‑highlighted code block with copy functionality; adding a dedicated tag facilitates discovery of developer‑oriented components.

proposed_tags.label: Syntax highlighting
proposed_tags.reason: The code-block component includes syntax highlighting via Prism libraries; a specific tag enables filtering by this capability.

proposed_tags.label: Utility button
proposed_tags.reason: Delta’s copy-button component is a specialized button used to copy text to the clipboard; tagging it as a utility button distinguishes it from primary/secondary buttons.

proposed_tags.label: Zoomable image
proposed_tags.reason: The cambio-image component implements interactive zooming on images; creating a tag aids in finding advanced image components.

proposed_tags.label: Card deck
proposed_tags.reason: Delta’s card-deck component creates a swipeable stack of cards using framer-motion and swiper; this pattern merits its own tag.

proposed_tags.label: Admonition
proposed_tags.reason: Admonition provides stylized callout boxes for notes or warnings; a tag helps differentiate these from generic alerts.

proposed_tags.label: QR code
proposed_tags.reason: Delta includes a QR code component using qr-code-styling; adding a tag makes it easy to find code‑generation widgets.

proposed_tags.label: Chat interface
proposed_tags.reason: Delta’s chat component is a streaming chat interface for LLM interactions; a dedicated tag supports discovery of AI chat UIs.

proposed_tags.label: AI chat
proposed_tags.reason: Some chat components are specifically designed for AI or LLM conversations; this tag captures that specialization.

proposed_tags.label: Map pointer
proposed_tags.reason: Delta provides a mapbox-pointer component for interactive maps; adding a tag for map pointers aids search for location widgets.

proposed_tags.label: Angle slider
proposed_tags.reason: Dice UI’s angle-slider is a radial input not represented by existing slider tags; a dedicated tag differentiates it from linear sliders.

proposed_tags.label: Circular progress
proposed_tags.reason: Dice UI offers a circular-progress indicator with custom animations; introducing a tag helps group radial progress indicators.

proposed_tags.label: Color picker
proposed_tags.reason: Dice UI supplies a complex color picker built on multiple primitives; a dedicated tag aligns with user expectations and parallels other UI libraries.

proposed_tags.label: Color swatch
proposed_tags.reason: Color swatches are small selectable colour squares used by color pickers; adding this tag captures such mini controls.

proposed_tags.label: Compare slider
proposed_tags.reason: Dice UI’s compare-slider allows dragging a handle to reveal one image over another; this pattern needs its own tag for A/B comparison components.

proposed_tags.label: Image cropper
proposed_tags.reason: Dice UI includes a cropper for selecting image regions; a dedicated tag helps identify image editing controls.
